metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development workflow bundle: feature (end-to-end issue → branch → design → strict TDD → PR → review-fix → archive orchestrator) and health-audit (five-dimension codebase health audit producing a ranked report, filed issues, and approved auto-fix PRs)

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git & GitHub workflow bundle: commit-msg (commit message options), branch-report (branch-vs-default comparison report), pre-push-test (test-before-push git hook), and the gh suite (gh-issue, gh-dev, gh-pr, gh-comment, gh-fix, gh-archive) for issues, branches, PRs, comments, review-feedback, and session archival

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation & content bundle: readme (write or improve a README for any repository) and seo-meta (generate SEO metadata as YAML frontmatter for markdown articles)

plugins.name: skill-optimize
plugins.description: Skill-authoring meta-tools: gotcha-capture (document pitfalls into a skill) and skill-benchmark (score and improve skill quality)

plugins.name: daily
plugins.description: Personal daily-workflow bundle for an Obsidian vault: gmail-helper (multi-account inbox triage), daily-planner (morning plan via Eisenhower matrix), and daily-reviewer (evening retrospective)

plugins.name: portfolio
plugins.description: Personal investing portfolio bundle over an Obsidian tracker: portfolio-update (ingest broker screenshots, log trades) and portfolio-review (read-only thesis drift/anchoring/staleness review)

plugins.name: gma2
plugins.description: grandMA2 lighting-console bundle (drives the gma2 MCP server over Telnet): connect (install/register the MCP and verify the console), presets (build Gobo/Color/Beam/Focus palettes from fixture XML with per-type DMX resolution), setlist (build a per-song macro/sequence/page/executor/view + artist-coloured master cuelist from a rundown, wired to the name-driven Song Change engine), and bpm (detect audio tempos via librosa and write them into song macros)

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude Code skills

plugins.name: understand-anything
plugins.description: Transforms codebases into interactive knowledge graphs with visualization, chat, diff analysis, and onboarding guides

plugins.name: planning-with-files
plugins.description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning to organize and track progress on complex tasks

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design skill that guides AI tools toward creating better frontend UI designs by avoiding common pitfalls

plugins.name: openspec
plugins.description: Spec-driven development framework that aligns AI and humans on requirements before writing code

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Collection of advanced skills for brainstorming, planning, debugging, TDD, code review, and parallel agent workflows

plugins.name: graphify
plugins.description: Converts code, docs, PDFs, and images into queryable knowledge graphs with visualization and export

plugins.name: mempalace
plugins.description: Mine projects and conversations into a searchable memory palace with semantic search and wing/room organization

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's engineering skills collection (diagnose, grill-me, grill-with-docs, handoff, improve-codebase-architecture, to-prd, setup-matt-pocock-skills) — external reference

plugins.name: find-skills
plugins.description: Discover and install agent skills from across known skill repositories (Vercel Labs) — external reference
